creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
At Fri, 16 May 2008 14:04:59 +0300,
Alex Kozlov wrote:
> 
> Hi, Timothy Beyer
> 
> I think games is a more appropriate primary category.
> See for example games/scummvm.

Hi Alex,

That change sounds fine to me.  Since both are primarily used for playing games, I suppose that classification is more appropriate.

Could it be crosslisted in emulators as a side category? I would actually describe scummvm the same way, since it is an implementation of a game engine as well.  I suppose the difference between these programs and say, zsnes is that they aren't emulating hardware.

Tim
